name: Arroz Con Pollo (Chicken and Rice)
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Skinless, boneless chicken cut into 1-inch strips
1 cup Crushed and drained canned Italian plum tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute chicken strips in a nonstick skillet until white, about 5 minutes. Set aside and keep warm.
2. In a large skillet, combine all ingredients except for the peas, pimentos, and capers. Bring to a boil.
3. Cover and simmer for about 30 minutes, until rice has absorbed the liquid.
4. Add peas, remove from heat, and let steam.
5. Arrange chicken and sauce over rice, garnish with pimentos and capers.
6. Makes 6 servings.
